testcase.name: Board initial and empty serialize to expected FEN placement
Board fromFenPlacement rejects malformed ranks and invalid pieces
GameState fromFen rejects malformed metadata
GameState withHistory appends the current state
CastlingRights fromFen rejects duplicate rights
Piece fromFenChar rejects non-letter characters
GameRules detects fifty-move rule
GameRules detects threefold repetition from history
GameRules detects insufficient material
GameRules detects king versus king as insufficient material
applyMove updates castling rights for king move, rook move and rook capture
applyMove updates promotion, en-passant target and clocks
GameRules reports check without immediate draw override
controller handles promotion-required, finished-game move, resign, help and unknown command
show moves rejects opponent piece and pieces without legal targets
command parser accepts aliases and rejects invalid promotion suffix

failure.message: ProcessTurn("e7e8x") was not an instance of chess.controller.Command$Unknown, but an instance of chess.controller.Command$ProcessTurn

testcase.failure: org.scalatest.exceptions.TestFailedException: ProcessTurn("e7e8x") was not an instance of chess.controller.Command$Unknown, but an instance of chess.controller.Command$ProcessTurn at testcase.name: MoveGenerator covers queen, black pawns and extra castling branches
MoveGenerator attack detection covers missing king and blocked attacks
TerminalView renders all footer states, highlights and flipped coordinates
TerminalView helpers and StdConsoleIO are directly executable
Main.main prints startup text and exits on quit input
